_comment_sizing: 5% of balance per trade. This is what actually drives position size — matches the Bot Settings Max Position Size slider.
_comment_cooldown: 15 minutes between signals on the same symbol to avoid overtrading.
_comment_confidence: Minimum confidence score to take any trade. 40 = 3× leverage tier minimum.
_comment_strategy: Priority order: EMA_TREND first (best quality), BREAKOUT second, MEAN_REVERT only in ranging markets.
_comment_sl_tp: SL/TP controlled by Bot Settings sliders. Algorithm uses ATR-based levels, then takes min(ATR_SL, hard_limit_SL) and max(ATR_TP, hard_limit_TP). See base_algo_patches.md.
notes: v6: Three strategies (EMA Trend Pullback, Donchian Breakout, BB Mean Revert). ATR-based SL/TP merged with Bot Settings hard limits — tighter SL wins, wider TP wins. Trailing stop from Bot Settings toggle. risk_pct_per_trade=5.0 now matches Max Position Size slider. No arbitrary time limits.
